name: Ljosalf of the Nordic Alfar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>リョースアールヴ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster you control, except this card; Special Summon 1 "Nordic" monster from your hand with a Level less than or equal to that face-up monster's Level.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster you control, except this card; Special Summon 1 "Nordic" monster from your hand with a Level less than or equal to that face-up monster's Level.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster you control, except this card; Special Summon 1 "Nordic" monster from your hand with a Level less than or equal to that face-up monster's Level.
